# hasAdjustMode

**Instance Property**

Returns whether the adjust mode view tab should be displayed.

## Declaration

```swift
optional var hasAdjustMode: Bool { get }
```

## Return Value

[doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] if the tab should be displayed, otherwise NO.

## New Methods

- **hasDetailsMode**: Returns whether the details mode view tab should be displayed.
- **hasEffectsMode**: Returns whether the effects mode view tab should be displayed.
